name: Watercress, Endive Salad (Mf)
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the watercress and remove the stems.
2. Cut the endive into cross pieces.
3. Toss the chopped watercress and cut endive together in a bowl.
4. Dress the salad with mustard vinaigrette.
Yield: 4 servings
Busted by Gail Shermeyer  on Jul 12, 97
